hero.title: Let's talk about your
hero.subtitle: Whether you have a clear idea or just a need, we're here to discuss. First consultation free.

form.title: Send us a message
form.name: Full name *
form.subject: Subject
form.success_message: We'll get back to you within 24 business hours.

calendly.title: Prefer a call?
calendly.subtitle: Book a 30-minute slot directly in our calendar.

cost.question: How much does a project with WareBi cost?
cost.answer: Every project is unique. We provide a free quote after an initial discussion to understand your exact needs and offer the most suitable solution.

timeline.question: What are your timelines?
timeline.answer: It varies by complexity. A dashboard can be delivered in 2 weeks, a complete application in 2-3 months. We establish a detailed plan at the start of each project.

remote.question: Do you work remotely?
remote.answer: Yes, we work with clients throughout France and internationally. Our collaborative tools make us just as effective remotely as in person.

small.question: Can we start small?
small.answer: Absolutely. We often recommend starting with a pilot project to validate value before scaling. It's a pragmatic approach that limits risk.
